markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Innerwell and GrowthX to address SEO structure issues and plan site reorganization.](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Current site structure is messy with duplicated pages** - Multiple versions of state/city pages exist across different URL structures, causing SEO problems and splitting traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**New URL structure agreed upon**: `/service/state/city` format with proper breadcrumb navigation](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [**Implementation plan**: Map and redirect all pages (especially "availability" pages) to new structure, fill gaps for missing city pages](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [**Mental health pages** confirmed as important umbrella pages that should connect to specific services](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

## Topics

### Current Website Issues

  - [Multiple duplicated pages across states and cities, especially for ketamine therapy](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [No consistent URL structure across services (ketamine, mental health, EMDR)](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Pages are "orphaned" with no internal linking between related content](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Despite poor structure, newer formatted pages are performing better in SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Some pages missing clinician modules that could help with conversions](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Current structure splits crawl budget and creates competing pages targeting same keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)

### Proposed URL Structure Solution

  - [Implementation of hierarchical URL structure: `/service/state/city`](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Example: `helloinnerwell.com/ketamine/california/los-angeles`](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Mental health pages to remain as important umbrella pages](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Add breadcrumbs to all pages to improve navigation and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Add clinician modules to ketamine therapy pages (currently only on mental health pages)](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Revise footer links to reflect new structure](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

### Implementation Plan and Priorities

1.  Confirm technical feasibility of nested URL structure with dev team
2.  Map old URLs to new structure (focusing on state pages first)
3.  Set up 301 redirects in batches:
      - [New state pages to their new URL homes](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [Redirect all "availability" format pages](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Address city pages](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
4.  Fill gaps by creating missing city pages in new format
5.  Fix internal linking between pages
6.  Update footer with new site architecture

### Additional Concerns

  - ["Conditions" pages (like ketamine for depression) get few organic clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Some city pages never indexed by Google](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Need to reorganize how cities link from state pages](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Many pages lack proper navigation and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Akina to confirm foldering capabilities with development team](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Jakub to send mental health page structure proposal today](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Jakub to provide list of states with new URL structure](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Team to pause new content development until structure issues are resolved](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
  - [Implement breadcrumbs on state pages linking to cities](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [Begin mapping and redirecting pages once structure is approved](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Add clinician modules to ketamine therapy pages](https://fathom.video/share/Kzn7GcwuxQZW1n6Xtw_auBpGinrhjKSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
